summary: This document outlines a demo script for a website video showcasing the AI phone agent's interaction with an elderly user named Peter. It details the conversation flow regarding medication reminders and doctor appointments, alongside a visual description of the split-screen interface highlighting care features. The script emphasizes the product's value proposition of empathy, respect for doctors, and family peace of mind.
